gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/188)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/188)
text: لَمَّا حَسَرَ الْمَاءُ عَنْ عِظَامِ الْمَوْتَى فَرَأَى ذَلِكَ نُوحٌ ( عليه السلام ) جَزِعَ جَزَعاً شَدِيداً وَ اغْتَمَّ لِذَلِكَ فَأَوْحَى اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ إِلَيْهِ هَذَا عَمَلُكَ بِنَفْسِكَ أَنْتَ دَعَوْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ فَقَالَ يَا رَبِّ إِنِّي أَسْتَغْفِرُكَ وَ أَتُوبُ إِلَيْكَ فَأَوْحَى اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ إِلَيْهِ أَنْ كُلِ الْعِنَبَ الْأَسْوَدَ لِيَذْهَبَ غَمُّكَ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Al Qasin Al Zayyat, from Aban Bin Usman, from Musa Bin Al A’ala,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘When the water laid bare the bones of the dead, so Noah<sup>as</sup> saw that and panicked with an intense panic, and was aggrieved due to that. So Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Revealed unto him<sup>as</sup>: “This is your doing, you<sup>as</sup> supplicated against them”. So he<sup>as</sup> said: ‘O Lord<sup>azwj</sup>! I<sup>as</sup> seek Forgiveness from You<sup>azwj</sup> and I<sup>as</sup> repent to You<sup>azwj</sup>’. So Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Revealed unto him<sup>as</sup>: “If you<sup>as</sup> were to eat the black grapes, it would do away with (remove) your grief’.
en.sarwar: 2. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from al-Qasim al-Zayyat from Aban ibn ‘Uthman from Musa ibn al-‘Ala’ who has said the following: “Abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘When water dried up and bones of the dead bodies were unveiled, Nuh, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, became extremely unhappy and sad. Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, sent him revelation that said, ‘This is your own act. It was you who prayed against them.’ Nuh said, ‘My Lord, I ask You to forgive me and I turn to You (for kindness).’ Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, sent him revelation to eat black grapes.’”
